argument.script: async (intermediate) => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 4000)); const text = document.body?.innerText || ''; const titleMatch = document.title.match(/^【[^】]*】(.+?)【/); const title = titleMatch ? titleMatch[1].trim() : document.title.split('-')[0].trim(); const priceMatch = text.match(/¥([\d,.]+)/); const price = priceMatch ? '¥' + priceMatch[1] : ''; return { title, price, sku: '{{ sku }}' }; }

async (intermediate) => { const dryRun = '{{ dry-run }}' === 'true'; if (dryRun) { return [{ status: 'dry-run', title: (intermediate.title || '').slice(0, 80), price: intermediate.price || '', sku: intermediate.sku }]; } return { needCart: true, title: intermediate.title, price: intermediate.price, sku: intermediate.sku, num: {{ num }} }; }

async (intermediate) => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 4000)); const url = location.href; const text = document.body?.innerText || ''; if (text.includes('请登录') || text.includes('login') || url.includes('login')) { return [{ status: '✗ 需要登录', title: intermediate.title?.slice(0, 80) || '', price: intermediate.price || '', sku: intermediate.sku }]; } if (text.includes('已成功加入') || text.includes('商品已成功') || url.includes('addtocart')) { return [{ status: '✓ 已加入购物车', title: intermediate.title?.slice(0, 80) || '', price: intermediate.price || '', sku: intermediate.sku }]; } return [{ status: '? ' + url.substring(0, 60), title: intermediate.title?.slice(0, 80) || '', price: intermediate.price || '', sku: intermediate.sku }]; }

variables.name: dry-run
variables.help: 仅预览，不实际加入购物车
